name: Three Bran Refrigerator Muffins-Adapted
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the boiling water over the wheat bran in a bowl. Let stand.
2. Combine flours, baking soda, and salt in a separate bowl. Blend well.
3. Cream the margarine, prunes, sugar, and molasses in a very large bowl until light and creamy. Add the eggs and buttermilk, beating until smooth. Stir in wheat bran, the flour mixture, All Bran, oat bran, and raisins. Mix until well blended.
4. Spoon batter into greased muffin cups and bake at 400 degrees for 18-23 minutes, depending on size.
5. Store unused batter in an airtight container in the refrigerator until ready to use. This mixture will keep for up to 2 months.
6. To use, take batter directly from the refrigerator and bake the muffins at 375 degrees for 20-25 minutes.
